textByHash.5701660b5df42b0702a3bfda186342083955fc78: Excellent, hand it over and I'll sign it on behalf of the guild if everything looks in order.
textByHash.a5adab04bab0befbc61a4161cb8f5c9f5b38bae4: Good day, adventurer. If you have any questions, I'm sure Lars will be more than happy to answer them. He's in the building to the south.
textByHash.b6c80781491679d704f2572a1ed6b7b7749511b6: What do you think you're doing?
textByHash.cd1edd7798c8341b3f0776556fed22e0a4176d03: Also don't forget to visit my sister's axe shop. She works in the same building as Lars.
textByHash.d67f62a8a2a6eb38882bf5ace09dbccff45efa0a: Everything has been signed, so you just need to take it back to the sawmill operator at the Varrock sawmill.
textByHash.d8750e0d0281d4cd8a99fbd6cd4957fba9023bed: Hello there, what business do you have with the Woodcutting guild?
textByHash.e81c199eb68cbff5a45cb7822f1e08888f8c022a: There you go, we'll ship the redwood planks over to Varrock sawmill immediately.
textByHash.f859fa6bdd98a782b7cbd05f170e49b450dc8086: Ah yes, our sawmill operator was expecting you. Do you have the proposal with you?
textByHash.f86c6e09a9d97a614d7e65738b512f45b31c30a1: Welcome to the woodcutting guild, adventurer.
